title: Test Strategy, Contracts, Properties, and Mutation · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Design a layered test suite around risks rather than file counts. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a risk-to-test coverage matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.
Test public behavior, invariants, boundaries, and failure recovery.
Use generated cases for algebraic properties, parser boundaries, and state invariants.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Test Layers evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Test Layers assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: gates tests. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Test Layers, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a risk-to-test coverage matrix.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: More end-to-end tests make lower-level tests unnecessary. This fails the Test Layers contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Clang AddressSanitizer and UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer (Clang 23 development documentation) — Controls native-code runtime sanitizer purpose, build profiles, output, limitations, and security cautions.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

stimulus.title: Flaky Tests case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: gates tests. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Retrying a flaky test converts it into a reliable gate.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership. Artifact under review: a risk-to-test coverage matrix.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Flaky Tests, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Flaky Tests applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
